questions.question: Explain the difference between Priority Scheduling and Rate Monotonic Scheduling (RMS) algorithms. Provide an example of when you would use each.
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation and example.

questions.question: Describe the concept of Context Switching and explain why it is an overhead in the CPU scheduling process. Provide a formula to calculate the average context switching time.
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation and formula.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a Critical Section and a Wait-Free Section in the context of Process Synchronization? Provide an example of a situation where you would use each.
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation and example.
